data.name: CreateOrganizationRequestValidator_InvalidName
data.value: The 'Name' is either missing or invalid

data.name: InviteOrganizationMemberRequestValidator_InvalidUserEmail
data.value: The 'Email' is either missing or invalid

data.name: InviteOrganizationMemberRequestValidator_MissingUserIdAndEmail
data.value: Both the 'Email' and 'UserId' are missing

data.name: InviteOrganizationMemberRequestValidator_BothUserIdAndEmail
data.value: Only the 'Email' or the 'UserId' can be provided, not both

data.name: ChangeOrganizationRequestValidator_InvalidName
data.value: The 'Name' is invalid

data.name: AssignRolesToOrganizationRequestValidator_InvalidRoles
data.value: The 'Roles' is either empty or contains invalid roles

data.name: AssignRolesToOrganizationRequestValidator_InvalidRole
data.value: The 'Role' is invalid

data.name: MoveToWorkflowStepRequestValidator_InvalidNextStepId
data.value: The 'NextStepId' is invalid

data.name: UpdateCurrentWorkflowStepRequestValidator_InvalidValues
data.value: The 'Values' is either missing or empty

data.name: InitiateOnboardingWorkflowRequestValidator_InvalidWorkflow
data.value: The 'Workflow' is either missing or invalid

data.name: WorkflowSchemaValidator_InvalidName
data.value: The 'Name' is either missing or invalid

data.name: WorkflowSchemaValidator_InvalidStartStepId
data.value: The 'StartStepId' is either missing or invalid

data.name: WorkflowSchemaValidator_InvalidEndStepId
data.value: The 'EndStepId' is either missing or invalid

data.name: WorkflowSchemaValidator_InvalidSteps
data.value: The 'Steps' is either missing or empty

data.name: StepSchemaValidator_InvalidId
data.value: The 'Id' is either missing or invalid

data.name: StepSchemaValidator_InvalidTitle
data.value: The 'Title' is either missing or invalid

data.name: StepSchemaValidator_InvalidWeight
data.value: The 'Weight' must be between 0 and 100

data.name: StepSchemaValidator_InvalidNextStepId
data.value: The 'NextStepId' is invalid

data.name: BranchSchemaValidator_InvalidId
data.value: The 'Id' is either missing or invalid

data.name: BranchSchemaValidator_InvalidLabel
data.value: The 'Label' is either missing or invalid

data.name: BranchSchemaValidator_InvalidNextStepId
data.value: The 'NextStepId' is either missing or invalid

data.name: BranchSchemaValidator_InvalidCondition
data.value: The 'Condition' is either missing or invalid

data.name: BranchConditionSchemaValidator_InvalidField
data.value: The 'Field' is either missing or invalid

data.name: BranchConditionSchemaValidator_InvalidValue
data.value: The 'Value' is either missing or invalid

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_AnyStepNextStepUndefined
data.value: Step '{0}' cannot reference a non-existent step '{1}' as next step

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_AnyBranchNextStepUndefined
data.value: Step '{0}' branch '{1}' cannot reference a non-existent step '{2}' as next step

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_MultipleStartNodes
data.value: Workflow can only have one 'Start' node, found: {0}

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_MultipleEndNodes
data.value: Workflow can only have one 'End' node, found: {0}

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_EndStepHasOutgoingEdges
data.value: End step '{0}' cannot have a next step or branches

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_StartStepHasIncomingEdges
data.value: Start step '{0}' cannot be referenced by other steps

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_StepNotReachableFromStart
data.value: Step '{0}' is not reachable on any path from the start step

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_StepCannotReachEnd
data.value: Step '{0}' has no path to the 'End' step

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_CycleDetected
data.value: Workflow contains a cycle involving step '{0}'

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_EndStepMustHaveZeroWeight
data.value: End step '{0}' must have a weight of 0, but has weight {1}

data.name: OnboardingWorkflowGraphService_Validate_LinearWorkflowWeightMustBe100
data.value: Linear workflow (without branches) must have a total weight of 100, but has total weight {0}
